title: Revised Staff Reports - Federal Reserve Bank of New York

source.name: Federal Reserve Bank of New York

summary: This page is an index/catalog of revised staff reports from the Federal Reserve Bank of New York, listing titles, authors, original release dates, and revision dates (spanning 2006-2017). It does not contain full text of any individual report, key findings, or actionable data. The page itself has no publication date.
key_points: This is a listing/index page, not an individual research paper or actionable market document
Papers were revised across multiple years (2006-2017 revision dates), making the content historical

Market-structure-relevant papers include: 'Market Liquidity after the Financial Crisis' (No. 796), 'Dealer Balance Sheets and Bond Liquidity Provision' (No. 803), 'The Microstructure of a U.S. Treasury ECN: The BrokerTec Platform' (No. 381), and 'The Use of Collateral in Bilateral Repurchase and Securities Lending Agreements' (No. 758)
The actual full-text content of individual reports is not provided in this source
No publication date is provided for the page itself; revision dates for listed papers range from 2006 to 2017
Source is not actionable for real-time market analysis as it is a historical archive index
why_it_matters: This catalog page has no standalone archival value. Individual research reports must be accessed separately to obtain substantive content. The listing covers market structure topics including dealer balance sheets, Treasury market microstructure, repo markets, and bond liquidity—but provides only metadata, not research.
market_structure_context: While the catalog references market-structure-relevant papers (SR 796, SR 803, SR 758, SR 381), this source provides only bibliographic metadata. No research content, data, or analysis is present for archival.

issues_found: PAGE_TYPE is listing_page - violates CORE RULE 6 which mandates rejection for listing pages
event_type incorrectly set to 'research_paper' - source is a catalog/index, not a research paper
No substantive research content provided - only titles, authors, and dates
No publication date for the page itself; revision dates span 2006-2017 making content historical and stale relative to TODAY (2026-03-31)
Cannot extract actionable market data, key findings, or research content from this source
Individual reports require separate retrieval - this source has no archival value on its own

notes: Non-archiveable listing page per CORE RULE 6. For market structure research, individual reports would need to be retrieved separately. Confidence set to 2 due to listing page type and lack of actionable content.
